title: Manage the implementation of a biosecurity emergency control program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage the implementation of a biosecurity emergency control program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Initiate biosecurity emergency management protocols

pcs.text: Identify, source or develop control procedures required to manage a biosecurity emergency control program according to legislation, standards, protocols and site conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, source or develop control procedures required to manage a biosecurity emergency control program according to legislation, standards, protocols and site conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, source or develop control procedures required to manage a biosecurity emergency control program according to legislation, standards, protocols and site conditions.

pcs.text: Implement operational objectives and plans within personal area of responsibility
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement operational objectives and plans within personal area of responsibility?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement operational objectives and plans within personal area of responsibility.

pcs.text: Contribute to plans and strategies developed by others
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Contribute to plans and strategies developed by others?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Contribute to plans and strategies developed by others.

pcs.text: Source resources for incursion according to resource plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source resources for incursion according to resource plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source resources for incursion according to resource plan.
